description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has three quarter sleeves with keyhole buttoned cuffs and branding in flock print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsVacation in style in this blue top from wrangler. The three quarter sleeves with buttoned cuffs and the round neck exudes femininity, while the flock print on the front brings out your happy spirit. Team this with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26"
